excluded.reason: 12% metric coverage; private subsidiary since Nov 2023 Rithm acquisition; no valuation multiples extractable

3_valuation_multiples.note: P/FRE and EV/FEAUM are primary multiples for correlation analysis. P/DE is supplementary (European/non-US firms do not report DE framework). Missing P/DE: EQT, CVC, BPT, TKO, RF. Missing all: VINP (BRL reporting, P/FRE not computed). III missing P/FRE (no FRE metric reported).

gap.reason: Petershill Partners delisted December 2025; limited post-delisting strategic action data available

4_actions_per_firm.decision: Log gap, retain PHLL in qualitative set with caveat

5_operational_metrics.note: All 7 reclassified metrics excluded from VD-A4 correlation analysis; eligible for context tables and deep-dives

6_fx_methodology.note: Period-end FX rates used for stock metrics (AUM, market cap); period-average rates used for flow metrics (revenue, FRE). FX_MATERIAL flags embedded in extraction_notes where applicable. EQT SEK/USD rate updated to 0.0928 in tier2.

format_normalizations: tier1a: extracted from data_points[] inside dict wrapper
tier2: extracted from firms[].data_points[] nested structure
tier3a: flattened from per-firm observations[] arrays; firm_id propagated to each observation
tier3b: remapped non-standard firm IDs (FIRM-ANTIN→FIRM-021, FIRM-III→FIRM-024, FIRM-PHLL→FIRM-026, FIRM-RF→FIRM-025, FIRM-RITM→FIRM-027)
